question.en: How much can I reduce a PDF file size?

answer.en: A typical PDF containing scanned images can be reduced by 50–80% in size. PDFs with mostly text compress less — typically 10–30%. Results depend on the original content and compression settings.
Our PDF compressor reduces image quality within the PDF to decrease file size. You can control the compression level. Text and vector graphics are unaffected — only embedded images are compressed.

question.en: Is there a file size limit?

answer.en: Since compression runs in your browser, the limit is your device's available memory. Most PDFs up to 100MB work fine. For very large PDFs, consider splitting them first.
